case_title: CAMP COUNSELORS USA, INC. VS. TIMBER RIDGE, INC.

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER CAMP COUNSELORS USA, INC.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-25-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER CAMP COUNSELORS USA, INC.
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CAMP COUNSELORS USA, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT TIMBER RIDGE, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER CAMP COUNSELORS USA, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL ENTER AN ORDER CONFIRMING THE ARBITRATION AWARD IN THE REQUESTED AMOUNT OF $31,344.84. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
